name: phrase_candidates_transcript_advanced
description: Phrase/grammar candidate extraction for transcript/dialogue with explicit 2-3 sentence context windows. Strict short phrase spans (2-6 words). No cloze, no translation, no card formatting. Downstream validators/ranking/generation will handle the rest.
system_prompt: You extract short reusable phrase candidates for language learning. Return ONLY a JSON array. No explanations, no markdown, no code fences.
user_prompt_template:
source_lang={source_lang}
target_lang={target_lang}
document_title={document_title}
source_url={source_url}
content_type=transcript_dialogue
learning_mode={learning_mode}
difficulty={difficulty}
max_items_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk}

Learner profile:
- CEFR C1/C2
- Strong comprehension; wants natural, reusable output for advanced active usage

TASK
You will receive one or more chunks.
For each chunk:
1) Select one local context window of 2-3 consecutive complete sentences copied verbatim from chunk_text.
2) Extract short phrase/grammar candidates from that context.

OUTPUT (JSON ARRAY ONLY)
Each item MUST be:
{
  "chunk_id": "chunk_0001",
  "context_sentences": [
    "Sentence 1 copied verbatim from chunk_text.",
    "Sentence 2 copied verbatim from chunk_text."
  ],
  "phrases": [
    {
      "text": "short phrase copied verbatim from the context"
    }
  ]
}

HARD RULES — CONTEXT
1) Return JSON array ONLY.
2) chunk_id MUST exactly match the input chunk_id.
3) context_sentences MUST be 2-3 consecutive complete sentences copied verbatim from chunk_text.
4) Do NOT output a single-sentence context unless chunk_text truly has only one complete sentence.
5) If chunk_text does not clearly contain at least 2 complete consecutive sentences, omit that chunk.
6) Prefer 2 sentences; use 3 only when needed.

HARD RULES — PHRASES
7) Each phrases[*].text MUST be an exact substring of the joined context_sentences text.
8) Each phrases[*].text MUST be 2-6 words. Count words by splitting on spaces.
9) Each phrases[*].text MUST be phrase-level, not a full sentence, not a near-full sentence, and not a long clause.
10) Each phrases[*].text MUST NOT contain "," ";" or ":".
11) Each phrases[*].text MUST NOT start with: that, which, whereas, because, although, even though.
12) Each phrases[*].text MUST NOT end with "." "!" or "?".
13) No duplicates within the same item.
14) Do NOT output cloze markers, numbering, HTML tags, translations, or extra keys.

SELECTION GUIDELINES
- Prefer reusable chunks for advanced active usage: discourse, stance, contrast, phrasal chunks, idiomatic collocations, short grammar patterns.
- Avoid trivial fragments, stopword-only spans, and weak sentence frames like "I think that", "I feel like", "the fact that", "the idea that".
- Prefer fewer good phrases over more weak phrases.

QUANTITY
- Prefer 2-5 phrases per item when possible.
- Maximum 6 phrases per item.
- If no good candidates exist for a chunk, omit that chunk entirely.

INPUT FORMAT
You will receive one or more chunks:
chunk_id=<id>
chunk_text=
<text>

chunk_text:
{chunk_text}
